title: Accessibility (a11y) Audit Output
description: Output of A11yAudit agent (commercial-cert only, R9 NEW). Runs axe-core / Lighthouse a11y / pa11y across changed surfaces. Consumed by deterministic A11yGate op.

_canonical_threshold_policy._doc: DOUBLE-WRITE anchor (slice qa-a11y-perf, 2026-06-05). These are the canonical a11y gate floors that MUST be mirrored into ctx.policy.a11y_floor when enterprise-qa-testing launches the commercial-cert workflow. Field names match exactly what qa-orchestrator.js `a11y_gate_policy` reads (floor.max_critical / floor.max_serious). Baked default ALSO lives in presets/commercial-cert.json context.policy.a11y_floor. Authoring this here keeps schema + gate-policy in lockstep so the workflow mode actually blocks. ADDITIVE / non-enforced JSON-Schema field (descriptive only — does not constrain agent output).
_canonical_threshold_policy._decision_semantics: critical_count > max_critical => BLOCK; serious_count > max_serious => WARN; else PASS. moderate/minor are advisory (reported, never auto-block). axe-core automated pass alone is NOT a full AA pass — only ~57% of WCAG 2.2 success criteria are machine-detectable; the remaining ~43% require the manual checks enumerated in qa-a11y-compliance SKILL.md.

wcag_level.description: Canonical commercial-cert target level is AA (see _canonical_threshold_policy.target_level).
